result.failure_reason: Observed 3,059,908,608 available bytes, below the required 8,589,934,592-byte start floor.

limits: The preflight shell command did not capture a machine timestamp alongside the vm_stat text; this artifact preserves the exact raw snapshot and is recorded contemporaneously on 2026-07-20.
Because the mandatory start floor failed, the procedure stopped before cache/dependency verification and before all model-runtime observations.
